svg.text: Senior AI Engineer · MLOps · Computer Vision · LLMs
Senior AI Engineer with 7+ years building production-grade machine learning systems. Specialising in MLOps
pipelines, real-time computer vision, and large language model integrations. Currently at Brod Services
delivering RFID and Computer Vision fusion for Sam's Club at scale.
Building RFID + Computer Vision fusion pipeline for Sam's Club. Real-time object
tracking, edge ML deployment, and high-throughput Kafka streaming at scale.
